_note: Part 1 establishes the framework + terminology. Other parts (2-5) build on these definitions.

key_concepts.EIR: Exchange Information Requirements — what the appointing party needs at each information exchange milestone
key_concepts.AIR: Asset Information Requirements — what's needed for the operational phase
key_concepts.PIR: Project Information Requirements — what's needed during the delivery phase
key_concepts.OIR: Organizational Information Requirements — appointing party's strategic requirements
key_concepts.BEP: BIM Execution Plan — how the delivery team will meet the EIR
key_concepts.MIDP: Master Information Delivery Plan — schedule of all information deliveries
key_concepts.TIDP: Task Information Delivery Plan — schedule for each task team
